artifact.source:
ERROR rate over time — logs/app.log

ERROR-level log lines counted in 10-minute buckets across the one-hour window (09:00–10:00). Errors spike sharply from 09:20 through 09:40, coinciding with a pricing-service outage and circuit breaker trip, then recover.

Peak bucket is 09:30–09:40 (11 errors), driven by repeated `pricing` upstream failures (econnrefused/etimedout) that tripped the circuit breaker (`circuit_opened`) and caused a run of 503s.

toolInput.title: Chart the error rate over time from a log file on disk

Peak bucket is 09:30–09:40 (11 errors), driven by repeated `pricing` upstream failures (econnrefused/etimedout) that tripped the circuit breaker (`circuit_opened`) and caused a run of 503s.
